output.notes: The website does not explicitly state bin colours, so common colours are used. The 'compostables bin' is assumed to cover both food and garden waste. The next pickup dates are calculated based on the provided calendar and assuming today's date is November 20, 2024, and the collection day for Rayleigh Avenue is Wednesday.

parts.content: You are a helpful web-browsing agent who researches and retrieves bin collection information for a specific council area by accessing their official website and lookup system

### Bin Collection Schedule Lookup Task

## Objective

Research and retrieve bin collection information for a specific council area by accessing their official website and lookup system.

## Instructions

# Step 1: Navigate to Council Website
Access the council website at: https://www.rochford.gov.uk/environment/recycling/bins-and-collections

# Step 2: Test Postcodes
Search for the collection schedules for this postcodes: SS11 8SX
If a full address is required, use any house number (e.g., "1 [Street Name]") or select any option on a dropdown. The specific address doesn't matter - we only need the collection schedule format

## Output

Provide the following information for each bin type (if exists) + the postcode:
    next_pickup_day
    frequency 
    bin_colour

If it doesn't exist, that is ok. Just answer None for these fields.

## Troubleshooting
If you encounter issues:

Look for alternative entry points (e.g., "Check my bin day")
Note any technical difficulties in your response
If the provided postcode doesn't work try postcodes from the same council area (use your knowledge of local postcodes).

### Ran Playwright code
```js
// Navigate to https://www.rochford.gov.uk/environment/recycling/bins-and-collections
await page.goto('https://www.rochford.gov.uk/environment/recycling/bins-and-collections');
```

### Page state
- Page URL: https://www.rochford.gov.uk/bins-and-collections
- Page Title: Bins and Collections | Rochford Council
- Page Snapshot:
    [Page snapshot removed for size optimization]
```

### Ran Playwright code
```js
// Click Accept cookies
await page.getByRole('button', { name: 'Accept cookies' }).click();
```

### New console messages

- Page URL: https://www.rochford.gov.uk/bins-and-collections
- Page Title: Bins and Collections | Rochford Council
- Page Snapshot:
    [Page snapshot removed for size optimization]
```

### Ran Playwright code
```js
// Select options [RAYLEIGH AVENUE Rayleigh] in combobox "Select Road"
await page.getByLabel('Select Road').selectOption(['RAYLEIGH AVENUE Rayleigh']);
```

### Page state
- Page URL: https://www.rochford.gov.uk/bins-and-collections
- Page Title: Bins and Collections | Rochford Council
- Page Snapshot:
    [Page snapshot removed for size optimization]
```

### Ran Playwright code
```js
// Click online bin collection calendar
await page.getByRole('link', { name: 'online bin collection calendar' }).click();
```

### New console messages
- [ERROR] Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 (Not Found) @ https://hom...

### Page state
- Page URL: https://www.rochford.gov.uk/online-bin-collections-calendar
- Page Title: Online Bin Collections Calendar | Rochford Council
- Page Snapshot:
    [Page snapshot removed for size optimization]
```

args.notes: The website does not explicitly state bin colours, so common colours are used. The 'compostables bin' is assumed to cover both food and garden waste. The next pickup dates are calculated based on the provided calendar and assuming today's date is November 20, 2024, and the collection day for Rayleigh Avenue is Wednesday.
